subject: WM-0087 review: changes_requested
body: High: required full-suite pnpm bench --artifacts-dir %TEMP%/wuming-town/WM-0087/review3-bench-full-suite still fails on reviewer rerun: map-dirty median 1.263ms vs 1.000ms baseline (+26.30%), exceeding the protected 20% blocking threshold. Temp artifact root did not dirty tracked M5/baseline artifacts; entity-store and m5-alpha-content-long-run were OK, and Chrome/Edge demo-only scope/threshold docs otherwise remain properly bounded.
